0._value: The cave fairy #b#p701##k in the #m10006000# seems to have a request. But even finding where the #m10006000# is located may be a challenge in itself...

1._value: The cave fairy #b#p701##k in the #m10006000# explained that she once lived much deeper inside the cave. She longs to return to her old home, but while out on a walk she was attacked by #o54#s and dropped the map she had drawn to find her way back. The monsters may have already torn it to pieces, but if I defeat the #r#o54#s#k east of #b#m10006000##k and gather the fragments, she might be able to figure something out.

2._value: As the cave fairy #b#p701##k requested, I defeated the monsters and brought back the fragments of the map to her original home. Hopefully some clues can still be found within them...

0._value: Oh my... It's been such a long time since I last saw a human in this #m10006000#. How did you manage to find this place? An ordinary human could never stumble across it—you must have remarkable courage.

1._value: Yes... Somehow, I feel I can trust you. We cave fairies once lived much deeper within the #m10006000#, but after that sorrowful incident long ago, we had no choice but to leave our home.

2._value: Still, I believe I can return one day. That’s why I drew a map when I left, so I would never forget the way home. But a few days ago, while walking around to refresh my memory, I was attacked by #o54#s and dropped my precious map.

3._value: I can't share everything with someone I've just met... but please, I beg you. Could you recover my map? The monsters may have already torn it apart, but even the fragments might hold clues.

0._value: Thank you so much! The monsters that attacked me were #r#o54#s#k. They dwell in the eastern parts of the #m10006000#. Please defeat them and bring back the map fragments.
So, #p700# was right after all... humans really are selfish...
I knew I could count on you to help. Now I can show #p700# that not all humans are selfish—that some really are righteous. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart!

1._value: Now I have to piece these fragments together, one by one. It'll take some time, but if it leads me back home, I will endure anything.

0._value: Please defeat #r#o54#s#k dwelling east of the village and bring back the map fragments. I’m counting on you.
